prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约524名→597名→550名→872名→1361名，整体呈明显后移趋势，近3年累计后移约811名，2024至2025年单年后移489 名，后移速度加快；2025年基准位次约1361名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年15人、2022年17人、2023年17人、2024年19人、2025年24人，持续扩招；20 26年计划24人，与2025年持平，扩招趋势暂停，竞争压力未因计划增加而缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学医学院隶属上海交通大学，985/211/双一流高校，软科 中国大学排名中上海交通大学主校位列第4名（Top 20），医学院为国内顶尖医学院之一，临床医学、口腔医学均为A+学科，办学层次极高；2026年声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及主校学术不端及管理事件），但医学 院独立招生，影响有限；抖音热度排名第42位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；近年无投档断档记录，报考心理稳定；临床医学A+、口腔医学A+、护理学 A-、生物学A+，与招生专业（临床医学八年制/五年制、口腔医学5+3一体化、医学试验班）高度匹配，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床 医学2024年热度指数70.19（推荐）、口腔医学72.31（推荐），医学类专业持续高热；山东省2026年考生总数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约5.7%，竞争加剧；上海交通大学医学院位于上海市，属一线城市，地域吸引力强；山东省非该校本地省份，无 本地保护性招生倾斜，跨省报考竞争完全取决于全国考生对上海+顶尖医学院的综合偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、山东省考生总数 明显增加、医学类专业持续高热、学校顶尖学科实力等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年进一步加剧，位次继续后移。预测最低录取位次约1391名，区间1224–1558名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读，法语班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）
- 临床医学（五年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 医学试验班（临床方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 上海交通大学医学院在山东省仅招收综合类考生，招生专业均为临床医学和口腔医学方向，学科实力均为A+顶尖水平。位次在预测区间1224–1558名以内，建议以二档的临床医学 （五年制）和口腔医学（5+3一体化）为主攻方向，一档的临床医学八年制本博连读作为冲刺，三档的医学试验班作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（1224名以内）可重点冲刺八 年制本博连读项目。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province were approximately 524 → 597 → 550 → 872 → 1361, showing a clear and accelerating backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 811 places in the last 3 years and a single-year backward shift of 489 places from 2024 to 2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1361. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province was 15 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 24 in 2025, showing continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 24, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend, and competitive pressure has not been alleviated by the increase in plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University, a 985/211/Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, the main campus of Shanghai Jiao Tong University ranks 4th (Top 20). The medical school is one of the top medical schools in China, with Clinical Medicine and Stomatology both rated A+, indicating an extremely high level of education. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (mainly related to academic misconduct and management incidents at the main campus), but the medical school recruits independently, so the impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms. There have been no recent records of gaps in admission, indicating stable application psychology. Clinical Medicine A+, Stomatology A+, Nursing A-, Biology A+, highly matching the enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine 8-year program/5-year program, Stomatology 5+3 integrated program, Medical Experimental Class), with top national disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for Clinical Medicine was 70.19 (recommended), and for Stomatology was 72.31 (recommended), with medical majors remaining highly popular. The total number of candidates in Shandong Province in 2026 is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from 681,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with strong regional appeal. Shandong Province is not a local province for this school, so there is no local protection enrollment preference; cross-provincial competition depends entirely on the overall preference of national candidates for Shanghai plus top medical schools.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the number of candidates in Shandong Province, the sustained high popularity of medical majors, and the top disciplinary strength of the school, it is expected that competition in 2026 will further intensify compared to 2025, with rankings continuing to move backward. The predicted minimum admission ranking is about 1391, with a range of 1224–1558.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year Bachelors-to-Doctorate Program)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year Bachelors-to-Doctorate Program, French Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Clinical Medicine (5-year Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Medical Experimental Class (Clinical Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine only admits comprehensive subject candidates in Shandong Province, with all enrollment majors in Clinical Medicine and Stomatology directions, all with A+ top disciplinary strength. For candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 1224–1558, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Clinical Medicine (5-year) and Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program) as the main targets, Tier 1 Clinical Medicine 8-year Bachelors-to-Doctorate Program as a reach, and Tier 3 Medical Experimental Class as a safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1224) can focus on reaching for the 8-year Bachelors-to-Doctorate Program.

_translation.university_name_en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
